changes: returned slightly buffed cybersun modsuits armour and modules to deepspace modsuits(security prisoner transport bags) and added access requirement(still can be hacked by cutting wires)

author: Arceniu
changes: modified blackmarket trader area( weapons spawner replaced with mini vault, removet non rp nova shield)

author: DenIS318
changes: Arrows are now weak against armor (armor is doubled when calculating damage, but it's done after armor penetration). Example: nuclear operative MOD received damage from arrow: 25 => 5, security officer with default loadout 36 => 22.
Revert "balance: The SolFed Halo rifles now have regular damage multipliers (1x damage for the assault rifle, 1.1x damage for the battle rifle/DMR)"
Revert "Discovery that the foregrips and handguards on the Zaibas longarms are not decorative has led to a decrease in recoil of 50% (half)"
Clown's car "Thank the Clown Car Driver" said words are localized

author: Arceniu
changes: Added IP id upgrade machine
updated ds 2 and interdyne - replaced generators with less powerfull version, replaced chameleon mod on ice ip with interdyne mod. chameleon mod now in Deck Officer room. Added borg spawners

author: DenIS318
changes: Talking to headset common channel now can be done both with: "; text" and ";text"
.40 Sol bullets (and subtypes) damage against unarmored targets 10 => 0 and bonus to wounds 5 => 0, as it was before

author: DenIS318
changes: Default deity and bible names translated in savefiles (for both new and already existing characters), also religion name if it's have translation.

changes: replaces closets with cargo crates at centcom cargo, changed centcom locations - armory, cargo pods

changes: Translates default bible names and it's related stuff, applies only for new characters (for now)

changes: Mass Traitors min_enemies 0 => 2

Sleeper Changeling light midround. Requires 3 min enemies of tier 1 dynamic, or 2 in tier2+. Starts from 15 population.
Mass Heretics heavy midround. Requires 3 min enemies. Starts from 25 population and spawns 2-4 heretics.

Hemophage heal ability blood consumption 0.9 => 1.0

Deathsquad leader spawn with nuclear disk

changes: Revert "a heavy duty rebalance of most station ballistics, raising their time to down by roughly around 35%, evening out to around 3-4s to down, instead of 2-2.5s"

changes: Removed eng skillchip from oldstation eng

author: DenIS318
changes: Throw-mode keybinding by default is R now (applies only when you don't have overrides for it)
Returned stunbaton's color chang based on cell (blue on bluespace cell and so on)

author: DenIS318
changes: Everything that gives TRAIT_NOSOFTCRIT (such as luxury medipens at mining, hulk mutation and all others sources) now makes you ignore random stun probability from being in soft crit
Hulk mutation is losed on going hardcrit, instead of when going softcrit
Hulk is now properly removed on death (in case it get one-shot somehow bypassing hardcrit)
Voltaic heart's overdrive effect is now heals until hardcrit (instead of softcrit)

author: DenIS318
changes: Plasma inflation price fixed after selling
non-handgun holsters now also can hold taser
Detective's holster now can properly hold some extra things (magazines, glock, banana), it's mostly fix

author: DenIS318
changes: Mech movement speed reduced accordingly to decreased carbon speed (~16% slower or +0.3 movedelay)
Ghost-roles engineering based roles now have engineering skillchip to see wires (DS2, Tarkon, Charlie Station)
Can use headset when restrained now
Trim Access is properly shown at ID computer again

author: DenIS318
changes: Revert "Allstar Lasers has updated a good chunk of their crew-attainable energy firearms with shiny new casings, as to unify their design philosophies or something."

Revert "The X-01 multiphase energy gun (HoS egun) now has matching capacities for laser and disabler (25 shots, up from 12 for laser, 20 from disabler) and a slight increase in ion mode capacity (5 shots, up from 4)."
Examining cell charger now shows grid's charging availability description. So if cell charger won't charge cells, it will display info related to that.

author: DenIS318
changes: Language Conversion is added at telecomms. It disabled by default and should be manually enabled in telecomms. It translates all speech from all languages to selected language.

Languages supported to automatic translate: calcic, sol common, draconic, encoded audio language (machine), mothic, nekomimetic, slime, spinwarder, galactic uncommon, voltaic, canilunzt, plutonian, pan-slavic, silk'tajr, skrelluq, vox, xerxian, yangyu, schechi

changes: Added nanotrasen&bolt import to cargo (basic and heavy armour, bolt guns, wt550, ammo for some other NT guns)
Removed nt rifle magasine, basic armour vest from sol
NT BR-38 Crate price decreased 20000 -> 12000

author: DenIS318
changes: NT BR-38 shots before degradation 30 -> 10 (as in TG)
NT BR-38 degradation probability 5 -> 10 (as in TG)
Those species can have gender now: plasmaman, monkey, zombie, ghost, golem, skeleton (pun-pun is no longer "they")
Max stamina damage 162 -> 120 (as in TG)
Sharpeners (2) added to Plasteel Chef's Dinnerware Vendor to premium products
Borers scale 0.5 => 1.0
Borers objectives are also shown in TGUI now
Borers spawn from dynamic event fixed (they still legacy antag and not 100% tested now)

Borers enabled to be spawned again in dynamic (weight 3, min pop = 5, does not require security). Borers are some kind "RP" antag for now, as they cannot directly control host (and cannot inhabit monkey)
Drone dispenser (station) now produces 3 => 1 in-active shells
Drone dispenser (station) cooldown 3 minutes => 5 minutes

author: DenIS318
changes: Clown Operatives is now can be spawned by dynamic
Cortical Borers temporaly disabled from dynamic, until they will be fixed (so you possibly can get other rulesets instead)
Revert "Round ID now shows in the top byond window text"

author: DenIS318
changes: Firefly hollow-point ammo is now visible (added missing sprite)
c38 caliber damage&values is back to old TG values (they used primary in detective revolver and BR38)
Cargo company import item's description is scrollable (If large enough)

author: Arceniu
changes: rebalanced some cargo imports again
added weapon permit req to purchase a silencer from imports
added NT and Sol guncases to cargo imports
added misc flags to cargo imports after 'tier2' hack(hacking implant/emag)

author: DenIS318
changes: Duplicate hotkeys for swap hands is unbound by default now (they were binded to Q that is also drop, and E that is quick equip), you still can bind them manually if need. Does not affect your current saved keybinding preferences (will work only if you reset all keybindings or new player).
Delay Round End now required +R_SERVER flag (Trial admins no longer can delay round end, however they still can start vote for restart)

author: DenIS318
changes: Flashdark darkness now properly follows & some other complex static lightning fixed
Dynamic now properly checks enemy roles (before it was not selecting any ruleset that required enemies due to error)
Electrocutes (from grille and all other sources) now gives you 2 second invulnerability from electrocute (so you won't die in half second by running into grille)
Living mobs now can die from single damage type normally (so 200 oxygen damage cap increased to 300, you need 230 oxy damage to die normally)
Experimental-partial fix papers markup, now %s works and some other markups as well (%f not work properly though)

author: Arceniu
changes: Prosthetic/synth stomach can now be safely emptied by using a screwdriver, or pried open with crowbar.

Synthetic stomaches now have separate basic chance to vomit items from vomit(surplus= 100 with at least 1 dropped item + damage), tier1(70 + damage), tier2(40 + damage), tier3(10 + damage), synth(10, without damage)
Synth and tier3 stomach no longer vomit from being punched
Xenomorphs stomach acid damage per cycle 75 => 15 for living (still 75 for non-living), and they no longer delete dead corpses

author: Arceniu
changes: Security vouchers now give branded guncase Instead of carton box
Removed security voucher box

changes: Returned NRI police

changes: Mech Chassis is now visible again
scream emote is usable again

changes: Metastation missed cargo autolathe is added back

Latejoin heretic is back
Revert "adds 1.2s fire delay to ion gun.", now it's no delay as it was before

author: DenIS318
changes: Forcing dynamic rulesets now skipping checks, that would prevent it from spawning normally (like required amount of enemies)
Pirates config fixed and now they can be properly spawned by dynamic

changes: Blueshield monitor UI changed to use new crew monitor UI

Can switch between cameras using mouse in Camera console

author: Arceniu
changes: Updated Blueshield MODsuit: Armour buff 40>45 melee, 20>25 wound. Added loud sound protection module and expanded storage module.
Updated NTR corporate MODsuit: slowdown decreased 0.35 > 0.25. Armour buff: melee 20 > 25, laser 15 > 20, energy 15 > 20, bomb 25 > 30, added loud sound protection module.
Updated Surplus Security MODsuit protection: energy 35 > 40, bomb 25 > 30.

author: Arceniu
changes: Added new items to imports from offs(synth neuroware, some more flatpacks)
fixed missing wound/decease analyzer in import

separated longarms from pistols in nri import
moved a couple of items in the import list(energy weapons import and taser item from nri guns to nri items) for a more beautiful look
rebalanced some cargo import items price

author: DenIS318
changes: Revert "Downgraded CE tools to T1 instead of T2"
Shouler holster when attached now have proper icon size

author: DenIS318
changes: Revert "Stasis Beds no longer let you do surgeries while its on"
Organ-related emotions (wings, tails) now require wing/tail, otherwise not usable
Removed 's ending form localized interactions, such as headpat, fistbump, handshake

author: DenIS318
changes: Fixed unica ammo on maps
Fixed maiden headband in loadout
Fixed pre-built DNA console on interdyne
Fixed .310 Strilka ammo on maps, in which it was placed

author: DenIS318
changes: Ghosting from AI-controlled mob no longer keep's their controller bound to you (you won't forcesay to deadchat chicken random phrases when ghosting from it)
Cyborgs (latejoin) now tries to spawn at cyborg chargers at relevant robotics area or satellite, instead of appearing from nowhere
Cyborgs (latejoin) arrival is announced

author: DenIS318
changes: Fixes few progressive dynamic runtimes, silicons now correctly considered for population to roll rulesets. Also min required enemies now properly working for tier 0 (greenshift), it's just takes it from next defined tier (usually tier 1)
Lavaloop fish now is "limited" with the same amount, but with respawn time 1 minute (to prevent it's spam on lavaland)
All fishing sources with explosive penalties now provide much less reward by explosions, especially rapid repeated (explosive penalty exponent 0.55 => 1.488)
Explosive penalty recovery for fishing increased (0.18 => 0.8), to compensate very high penalty
Cyborgs now properly hear NTTC
Remove nonlocalized nova's lawsets

author: OrionTheFox
changes: all 'accessory' webbings are now 'belt' webbings
all loadout belts can now hold a few more items

author: DenIS318
changes: Heads roles (including AI and some event roles such as Veteran advisor and so on) now require at least 5 hours playtime in department
Heads roles now also require 30 year old character
Ian no longer becomes invisible once reaches old age
License plate press circuit is added to "Security Equipment" technode
License plate press machine now require 1 servo and 1 matter bin to be built
License plate press with upgraded matter bin provides tier * 0.03 speed efficiency after 1 tier

License plate press with upgraded servo provides tier * 0.07 speed efficiency after 1 tier (tier 4 bin + servo provides in total 1+0.3 efficiency, that results in 0.7 * 4 seconds delay between filling plate)
Blank keybindings removed (all emote+ panel non-localized emotes binds)
Deletes some non-localized keybindings (perhaps will be returned back once localized)
Toggle gun's safety keybinding removed (there's no gun safety added to weapons already)
Combat indicator keybinding removed (there's no combat indicator for several months)
Tip for loadout medkit for players with < 3 hours
Health Analyzer now shows popup after performing scan (it's the same, as written to chat). The extra buttons such as "Print", "Clear" "Switch mode" are also here
You can examine Health Analyzer (in close range) to see last scan (in case there any stored)
Junk caliber casings now can be loaded into shotguns (to anything with shotgun caliber, however shotgun shells still can't be loaded in pipegun)

author: DenIS318
changes: Antag info TGUI UI fixed (was empty due to error)

author: DenIS318
changes: Loadout error icons fixed for dutch suit, white papakha, eastern monk's robes
Nucleations race added
Nucleations organs added
Nucleations are available for selection at roundstart
Nucleations receive 2x burn and 4x burn damage
Nucleations dies permamently with items, causing small explosion on death
Nucleations are immune to virus, does not breath, do not feel pain, immune to radiation
Radium heals nucleations by 3 burn/brute per tick
Added extra description for some species traits, can be seen when selecting species (virus immune, radiation immune)
Removed chestrigs from loadout
Removed seeds, pills, binoculars, some medkits from loadout

changes: Cargo sabre sheath (shamshir leather sheath) icon fixed

changes: Wag emote no longer sends non-localized message part

changes: Fix non-mime clap emote message

changes: Returned Security Medic
added brigmed locker to delta, meta, icebox,void, tram
returned nri flag

author: DenIS318
changes: Monkey AI in softcrit fixed
Monkey AI now also tries to search it's back (NOT IN BACKPACK) and belt (NOT IN IT'S STORAGE) slots as weapons when needed

author: DenIS318
changes: Ctrl + Shift + Click menu interactons translated.

author: DenIS318
changes: Minor emote localization fixes
Salute is now correctly displayed as non-mime

author: DenIS318
changes: PDA no longer lose charge when in recharger (no infinity charging)
Replaces most game font usages to MS Serif to fix cyrillic issues
Eyelids now shown even if blinking is disabled
Localized all basic emotions (some alien emotions/in emote panel and so on might still be not localized)
Emotes in emote panel localized
Emotes now can use nouns based on gender
Nova's Emotes+ panel disalbed (still can use /Me for it)
Nova's Silicon emotes disabled (still can use /Me for it)

author: DenIS318
changes: Basic Health Analyzer is now default at medbay equipment technode (spawn in med techfab) from start
Taser mode is now available at advanced energy gun
Max Size of species reduced 1.5 -> 1.2. This includes settings in editor and quirks. Admins can still set it higher manually.
Oversized quirk size reduced 2.0 -> 1.5
Handgun holster is added to detective closet
Now if species doesnt have custom basic emotes sounds, then it use human sounds
Free flip for everyone. No longer requires any traits to be done without delay

author: FlufflesTheDog
changes: Fix missing opfor/ghost/respawn buttons on the escape menu.

author: OrionTheFox
changes: fixed RPED icons disappearing when applying upgrades (they now use TG's updated icons)

author: DenIS318
changes: Justice mech code & icons moved to modular. So now it can be constructed again
Fixed errors related to justice that arise due to removal justice from TG
Dynamic admin panel height increased in tabs that are not rulesets from 400 to 500
ID computer login fixed errors on Nova's security levels (such as Orange and so on)
Now once casing left from gun that had custom projectile damage modifier, it's combat information displays info relative to previous gun. Also shows for normal modifier as well

author: DenIS318
changes: cargo ui plasmacost is shown at express console interface & pda intreface
Round Timer no longer start with something like 23:55:00... Instead from 00:00:00
Round Timer no longer jumps back to 00:00:00 once round start, round timer is calculated since start of server
Actual Round Timer is removed from status display, since Round Timer is actually "actual" now
Progressive Dynamic is reworked and added back

Progressive Dynamic now increase current dynamic tier level once certain amount of threat, based on how much non-antag alive security/heads/crew alive the same way, as it was before. Simple: if nothing happens for long (especially the longer shift) and you have alive security, dynamic level could be raised
Once dynamic level is raised by progressive dynamic, a report is sent to communications console and announced
New progressive dynamic UI added to Dynamic Panel

author: DenIS318
changes: Singulo no longer invisible
Whisper and italics text now properly shown in runechat
Reworked and fixed dynamic tweaks for new dynamic, including restricted species (mainly for changelings)
Minimal enemies (security/captain/blueshield/consultant) is added back to new dynamic
Set minimal enemies to similar values as it was before, but based on dynamic tier
Head of Staff (non-mindshield like Captain, Consultant) can now really become antags

author: DenIS318
changes: Man Up response for a-tickets
Revert "Removes the Justice mech (TG #92486)"
Revert "NT/E "Laevateinn" - a magnetic .38 revolver (Nova â„–5947)"

Max Health is reduced from 135 to 100 (so now in soft crit you can sustain up to 200 damage before falling to hard crit, instead of 270). However keep in mind, that health is tied to bodyparts damage, so it's not always exactly 100 health for softcrit, with 100 brute damage there might be "5" health, instead of 0. TL;DR One extra hit almost always would be be required.

author: DenIS318
changes: Adminwho for non-admins players no longer shows no-admins info, when there are admins
Added sprite to toy turret kit for request console (instead of ERROR)
Fixed double-equip outfit items for ghost role spawners

author: DenIS318
changes: Disabled automatic light flickering (from explosions and other stuff). Should result in better perfomance
Disable autotransfer vote when there's no players

author: Arceniu
changes: Upgraded blueshield medkit to fix synth
fixed some lost blueshield edits
blueshield now have 1984 modularity instead of offs code edit
fixed a some runtimes in DS2/IP/PT job accounts
returned jackets to ds2

author: DenIS318
changes: Removed NIFsoft default examine text ("There's a certain spark to their eyes."). You need to set it manually if you want it to appear (more than 6 characters)
Now transfer vote properly count non-voters as "Continue playing" as other votes does
Dynamic no longer counts non-station roles as "Alive" for rulesets population
Dynamic rolling no longer counts SSD/disconnected players as "Alive"

Example how Dynamic count alive players now: 1 secoff, 1 disconnected crew, 1 SSD crew, 2 normal crew, 1 dead crew, and 1 non-station role (tarkon) = 3 alive players, antags normally start from 5 population (including 1 security/captain). The same principes applying to "enemies" selection, such when calculating amount of alive security/heads (for revs)
Alive Players in dynamic panel now shows how much it count as "Alive" for rolling (no ghost roles... etc.). This might differ from other admin panels (it's should be that way)

Plasma inflation now works for ghostroles markets same way, as it does for station cargo. Interdyne and DS-2 market are shared. Total 5 markets: station, interdyne+ds, tarkon, pirates, "blackmarket" (when it doesn't fit any of others)
Plasma inflation is calculated during predict value on ghostroles pads (can view how much you will get from plasma before sending it)
Mutadone pills added to NanoDrug
Atmos techs now start with engineering skillchip
Syndicate research server is added to DS-2. It's have it's own techweb separated from station. Interdyne is also gain researches from it (in case they build R&D)
Spare Syndicate R&D server circuit added to DS-2 vault safe
Ghostroles such as Tarkon, DS-2, Interdyne no longer have destination to station docks
Tarkon instead of station can fly to Deep Space by using camera console (in case it was spawned)
Tarkon remote now can fly to any custom location and back to tarkon port (unique feature for tarkon shuttle only)

author: DenIS318
changes: Health analyzer (basic) is added to autolathe designs
Added 2 more atmos MODsuits storage units to all recommended maps (Delta, Meta, Tram, Icebox). Now it's 3 in total.
Replaced almost all empty defibs on all maps/templates with initially loaded defibs
Loaded defibs at maps now properly shows attached defib overlay
Disable unathi from roundstart races. Use lizardperson instead
Added 3 Ion Jetpack modules to engivend's premium with cost 400 per each
Ion Jetpack module is now auto-pinned on insert to pre-equipped MODsuits (not for fully hand-crafted MODs)
Delta is now considered as "default" map during map-votes (matters if someone doesn't vote at all and don't have prefered map selected)
When there's no votes at all during transfer vote, always "Continue Playing" is selected (so it won't auto-transfer when there's no players at all)
Transfer vote now normally accesible to players only at periods: between 15-40 minutes of round, after 90 minutes of round
If any admin use toggle vote for transfer vote at least once, this will disable automatic toggle behaviour (15-40-90 minutes thresholds)
Deleted unused client verbs, such as: "Link Forum Account", "Show Map Vote Tallies" (we don't use them at all)

author: DenIS318
changes: Huds no longer can change status from inside of bitrunning domains. Some other functional is limited as well from bitrunning.

author: DenIS318
changes: Security officers now are assigned per department (Science, Engineering, Medical, Cargo, Service)
Security department preference in character preferences
Service Security Officer. He doesn't have it's own post and start at brig
Max amount of sec offs increased accordingly (7 => 12) to fit departments
Corrections Officer now have security sunglasses (with HUD), instead of normal sunglasses
Security Officer's assigned to department start at their posts
Replaced department's guard lockers with security officer lockers
Department guards removed (Orderly, Bouncer, Customs Agent, Engineering Guard, Medical Guard)

author: DenIS318
changes: Reconnect after server restart most likely should always work now
Admin revive now heals scarring eyes
Colored PDA manifest
Now shows physical status in crew manifest, according to medical records such as Active/Deceased
Departments are colored in PDA manifest
Crew manifest no longer contains any silicons (they are NOT crew)
Crew manifest no longer contains any "Central Command" (blueshield, consultant, and other such are placed in "Command")

changes: Security Voucher supply crate's amount 4 => 3
Prison cell timers no longer says "NO DATA" and doesn't display admin-observer names
Now displays cryo wake up message when spawned on cryo pod, instead of default arrival message
Prisoners latejoin spawns at cryopods in permabrig, instead of appearing from nowhere
Dormitory vendor (CozyMate) no longer spawn on permabrig
Prisoners no longer spawn with any loadout, only with outfit
Prisoner is now colored at NTTC radio
Prisoner processing console UI height 500 => 540
SS1984 changes are now hightlighted in changelogs

changes: Fixed issues with broken say messages + no radio on machinery

author: Arceniu
changes: Added new vendor-with sleep suits and bedsheets
NTR trim now have CentcomBlue color big pointer

author: DenIS318
changes: Revert: Removed 'His Grace' from the Traitor uplink. It was a chaplain traitor only item that required you to consume 25 player corpses to ascend, making you inmune to stuns, regen life and putting you in a timer to kill as many people possible. (upstream #5777)
Bridge Officer no longer available to station
Added safe to HOS office with unica-6 in it with 3 speedloaders + holster for all recommended maps (Delta, Meta, Icebox, Tram)
Added safe codes to HOS office for all recommended maps (Delta, Meta, Icebox, Tram)

author: DenIS318
changes: Engineering Secure Storage button is added to all recommended maps (delta, meta, icebox, tram)
Revert: making detective role more unique, by removing crew pinpointer and detective scanner from their closets, preventing abuse this by officer's. (upstream #4464)
Detective scanner is added to HOS closet
Armory access no longer required to open security MOD room, now it's brig access. For all supported maps (Delta, Meta, Icebox, Tram)
Added oxygen canister to armory on recommended maps (Delta, Meta, Icebox, Tram)
Modular computers (PDA) now shows message when shutdown by powerloss
Modular computers (PDA) powerloss now triggering itself when cell charge's ends
Russian human female lastnames generation

author: DenIS318
changes: Plasma inflation mechanic for cargo. TL;DR: the more plasma you send rapidly, the less it worth.
Plasma sells at cargo now calculate new prices & revenue by curve similar to Log2(x)
Plasma price recovers in 15 mins (if there's no sells, if there's any plasma cell - timer stops and start again, but from current price)
Current plasma cost is displayed at cargo console UI
Plasma inflation works only for cargo shuttle, no away ghots roles/pirates
More detailed description & formulas & graphs are attached in pull request Excel file
Example: 50 plasma worth ~3200 credits, before worth 4000. And 1000 plasma (sold rapidly) worth ~8000 credits, before worth 80000
All simplemobs stamina slowdown reduced 3 => 2, except spiders
For spiders, flesh spiders stamina slowdown reduced 12 => 1
Hunter slug damage multiplier for compatible targets 5=>4, base damage still 20
Hunter Slugs no longer deals damage twice to compatible targets
Kiboko grenades projectiles speed increased 0.5 => 0.9 (normal projectile speed is 1.25)
NTTC at telecomms no longer works if machine is depowered/broken/EMP (comms blackout count as EMP)
SSD players no longer get considered for antag role in midround dynamic rulesets
Map vote now highlight recommended maps (Delta, Meta, Tram, Icebox) - these maps have up-to-date mapping
Highlighted options in vote displayed at top

author: DenIS318
changes: Dynamic rulesets now should correctly work based on enemies per threat, most rulesets require at least 1 enemy (security/captain)
Agent card "select all" and "deselect all" buttons now should correctly work
All midround antag rulesets except sentient disease and borers now require at least 1 enemy (security/heads) for lowpop. Some rulesets require more than 1.

Midround antags rulesets now require at least 5 players, for which they didn't required already. This includes: Syndicate Sleeper, Obsessed. And relevant latejoins. If you want such antagonists at all - you need at least 1 security (captain would fit as well)
Changes for minimum players for other rulesets, such as nuclear assault, wizard, etc...
Quiet ruleset now cost 0.1 threat instead of 0.00001...
Abandoned crates no longer can be hacked using screwdriver-multitool-wirecutter
Now you can see/set security notes/status and other records on yourself if you have relevant HUD.
Now can correctly set status/some other HUD related actions during softcrit
Now during changing security status with SecHUD comment can be added. Automatically adds all such actions it to crime history
revert Nova's Max message length 2048 -> 1024 (as it is in TG)
Added handgun shoulder holster, works similar as MOD Shoulder Holster, but attaches to suit
Added hotkey for attachable shoulder holster (H by default)
Shoulder holster is added to all security weapon kits (hybrid taser kit, sol pistol...)
Shoulder holster added to biogenerator craft for 200 biomaterial
